title: Audit curator role in internal contour
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem531_curator_role_audit.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP.md')
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem531_curator_role_audit.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

files = ['governance/INTERNAL_CONTOUR_REFERENCE.md','governance/GPT_HANDOFF.md','governance/GPT_WRITE_CHANNEL.md','governance/state/role_cycle_state.json','governance/transport/results.jsonl','.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml','.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml','.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml']
findings = []
curator_hits = []
role_hits = {'curator':False,'куратор':False,'telegram_curator':False,'service_curator':False}
for name in files:
    p=Path(name)
    if not p.exists():
        findings.append('- '+name+': MISSING')
        continue
    txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    low=txt.lower()
    hits=[]
    for term in ['curator','куратор','telegram-curator','telegram_curator','curator-webhook']:
        if term in low:
            hits.append(term)
    if hits:
        curator_hits.append(name+': '+', '.join(hits))
    findings.append('- '+name+': exists, curator_terms='+str(hits))
    if 'curator' in low:
        role_hits['curator']=True
    if 'куратор' in low:
        role_hits['куратор']=True
    if 'telegram-curator' in low or 'telegram_curator' in low:
        role_hits['telegram_curator']=True
    if 'curator-webhook' in low or 'ai-devops-telegram-curator-webhook' in low:
        role_hits['service_curator']=True

status = 'FOUND' if curator_hits else 'MISSING'

old_text = roadmap.read_text(errors='ignore') if roadmap.exists() else ''
if roadmap.exists():
    updated = old_text
    updated = updated.replace('analyst -> auditor -> executor -> GitHub Actions -> file transport -> role state', 'curator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> GitHub Actions -> file transport -> role state')
    updated = updated.replace('роли создают артефакты', 'curator принимает/маршрутизирует вход, роли создают артефакты')
    updated = updated.replace('routing analyst/auditor/executor', 'routing curator/analyst/auditor/executor')
    updated = updated.replace('analyst analysis -> auditor review -> executor file patch -> auditor final PASS -> transport result', 'curator intake -> analyst analysis -> auditor review -> executor file patch -> auditor final PASS -> curator closure -> transport result')
    if '### BEM-531.0 — Curator role contract' not in updated:
        insert = '\n### BEM-531.0 — Curator role contract\nЦель: формализовать роль curator как входной диспетчер внутреннего контура: intake, triage, назначение analyst/auditor/executor, контроль handoff и закрытие цикла.\nPASS: curator fields added to role_cycle_state schema, transport contract and synthetic E2E.\n'
        updated = updated.replace('## Дорожная карта доработок\n', '## Дорожная карта доработок\n' + insert + '\n')
    roadmap.write_text(updated)

report.write_text('# BEM-531 | Curator Role Audit\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:39 (UTC+3)\n\n## Итог\nПредыдущее описание внутреннего role-based контура было неполным: роль curator должна быть частью контура наряду с analyst, auditor и executor.\n\n## Status\n'+status+'\n\n## Проверенные файлы\n'+'\n'.join(findings)+'\n\n## Curator hits\n' + ('\n'.join(['- '+x for x in curator_hits]) if curator_hits else 'curator terms not found in inspected files') + '\n\n## Исправление roadmap\n`governance/tasks/pending/BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP.md` обновлён: добавлен блок BEM-531.0 Curator role contract и цепочка curator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> GitHub Actions -> file transport -> role state.\n\n## Обновлённая модель внутреннего контура\n1. Curator: intake, triage, назначение следующей роли, контроль handoff, закрытие цикла.\n2. Analyst: анализ задачи и подготовка решения.\n3. Auditor: проверка анализа/patch и решение PASS/BLOCKER.\n4. Executor: применение изменений через GitHub Actions/Python executor.\n5. Curator final: проверка завершения, запись результата в transport/state.\n\n## Следствие для BEM-531 roadmap\nПервым блоком должен быть BEM-531.0 Curator role contract, затем state schema, transport contract, workflow audits и synthetic role cycle E2E.\n\n## Blocker\nnull для аудита; E2E PASS внутреннего контура всё ещё требует выполнения BEM-531.0–BEM-531.6.\n')

proof.write_text('BEM-531 curator role audit completed. status='+status+'. Roadmap updated to include curator role contract.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report), str(proof)])
if roadmap.exists():
    changed_files.append(str(roadmap))
ops_applied.append('audited curator role and updated internal role contour roadmap')
"""
